title: OmniProject preset
description: A quick-load preset: a named bundle that configures an org for a way of working in one action, by referencing the pieces that already exist (a methodology to curate to, a reference ruleset, a starter project template, a persona dashboard, and a posture blueprint). One file per preset under assets/presets/<id>.json.

methodology.description: The methodology this preset curates the org to (must resolve in the methodology catalogue).

settingsPreset.description: Optional posture blueprint (settings-preset archetype) applied at apply-time; validated by the server, not this catalogue.

referenceRuleset.description: Optional reference-ruleset methodology id to apply (must resolve in the reference-ruleset catalogue).

projectTemplate.description: Optional project-template id to instantiate as a starter project (must resolve in the template catalogue).

dashboardPreset.description: Optional dashboard-preset id to mint for the operator (must resolve in the dashboard-preset catalogue).
